title: NNSA Administrator Williams visits LLNL to discuss stockpile modernization, AI and future deterrence
snippet: LLNL's Weapon Simulation and Computing Associate Director Rob Neely called the incorporation of AI agents and digital twins an 'exciting new frontier' for improving existing modeling and simulation workflows and accelerating delivery to meet mission demands.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — Rob Neely is directly quoted on AI agents and digital twins in his capacity as LLNL WSC Associate Director, and shown briefing NNSA Administrator on El Capitan and AI integration.
